preflight_checks: Verify required text keys exist in brand-guidelines-example.json.
Verify all hex colors are six-character values without #.
Verify all typography tokens include family, style, font_size, line_height_percent, and tracking_percent.
Verify every mapped node ID still exists in the connected Figma document before applying.
Preview text, typography, and palette updates before running apply.

targets.name: Title
targets.characters: The SoloOctopus palette is built on a nocturnal canvas. Near-black is the foundation, electric teal is the signal of distributed intelligence. White provides clarity and contrast, ensuring the brand reads with confidence across digital touchpoints, decks, and podcast art.
